CREATE TABLE test_map_concat (map1 Map(String, Int32), map2 Map(String, Int32), map3 Map(String, Int32)) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_map_concat VALUES (map('key1', 1, 'key2', 2), map('key2', 3, 'key3', 4), map('key1', 5, 'key4', 6));
SELECT mapConcat(map1, map2) AS result_map FROM test_map_concat;
SELECT mapConcat(map('keyA', 10), map('keyB', 20), map('keyC', 30), map('keyC', 40)) AS result_map;
SELECT mapConcat(map('key1', 1), map('key1', 2), map('key1', 3)) AS map, map['key1'] FROM (SELECT mapConcat(map('key1', 1), map('key1', 3)) AS map) tmp;
SELECT mapConcat(map('a', 1, 'b', 2), map('b', 3, 'c', 4), map('d', 5)) AS result_map;
SELECT map['key1'] FROM (SELECT mapConcat(map('key1', 1, 'key2', 2), map('key1', 3, 'key3', 4)) AS map) tmp;
CREATE TABLE map_test (m Map(String, Int32)) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT mapConcat(m) AS combined_map FROM map_test;

SELECT mapConcat(map('k1', 1), map('k1', 2), map('k1', 3), map('k1', 4)) AS all_keys_combined, all_keys_combined['k1'] AS single_value FROM (SELECT mapConcat(map('k1', 1), map('k1', 2)) AS all_keys_combined) tmp;
SELECT mapConcat(map('apple', 1), map('banana', 2), map('apple', 3)) AS fruits_map;
SELECT map['banana'] FROM (SELECT mapConcat(map('apple', 1), map('banana', 2), map('banana', 3)) AS map) tmp;
